user.title: Connect to WLED
user.description: Enter the IP address of your WLED device (find it in the WLED app or your router). After setup, add the 'WLED Task Map' card to any dashboard to create LED alerts visually.

confirm.title: WLED device found
confirm.description: Set up WLED Task Map for {name} ({host})? After setup, add the 'WLED Task Map' card to any dashboard to create LED alerts visually.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the WLED device. Check the IP address.

abort.already_configured: This WLED device is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the WLED device.

missing_entity.title: WLED Task Map rule watches a missing entity
missing_entity.description: An LED alert on {host} watches `{entity_id}`, but that entity no longer exists. Its LED will never light. Open the WLED Task Map card and edit or delete that alert.
